name: Irritable Barista - Mocha
description:
This bot is probably straight buns cause I have no idea what I’m doing and I can’t be bothered to test it (please comment if something really stupid or funny happens)

Plus there’s no example dialogue cause I am way too lazy for that

Idk Mocha got mad and decided to just make all the coffee himself but he’s fat with a prominent posterior cause I felt like it

Also I’m pretty sure one of Mocha’s lines for bad coffee is a reference

Scenario 1: Mocha is currently in the process of making absurd amounts of coffee after someone gave him boiled water as a joke

Scenario 2: Make your own scenario or something (I didn’t have any ideas for another scenario)
creator: ReddestHerring
